description: This file contains the definition of MainViewModel, a ViewModel class in an Android application written in Kotlin. It manages user authentication states, interactions with the AuthManager, and networking via ApiClient. The class exposes observable state flows for UI to react to authentication status and logs, and provides functions for login, logout, lock, unlock, and calling protected endpoints. It also initializes the authentication state from secure storage and observes auth state changes.

classes.name: MainViewModel
classes.description: A ViewModel class that handles user authentication states, interactions, and UI updates for the Android application.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Performs login operation using provided username and password, updates auth state upon success or failure.

methods.name: lock
methods.description: Locks the current session, marking it as locked.

methods.name: unlock
methods.description: Unlocks the session after biometric or credential verification.

methods.name: callProtected
methods.description: Calls a protected network resource endpoint.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Clears stored tokens and sets the auth state to logged out.

methods.name: clearLog
methods.description: Clears the status log maintained by the ViewModel.
